description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that creates a tag for a release when a pull request is closed or when manually dispatched with a commit hash input. The workflow checks specific conditions such as the pull request being merged by github-actions and having a head ref starting with 'bump-version'. It then checks out the code at the specified commit, installs the Rust toolchain, extracts the version from the cargo package, and creates a signed tag with the extracted version and pushes it to the origin.
